Running: cat <<'EOF' >/tmp/debug_desc.go package main import ( \"bytes\" \"compress/gzip\" \"fmt\" \"io\" \"github.com/cosmos/gogoproto/proto\" proto2 \"google.golang.org/protobuf/proto\" \"google.golang.org/protobuf/reflect/protodesc\" \"google.golang.org/protobuf/reflect/protoreflect\" \"google.golang.org/protobuf/types/descriptorpb\" ) func unzip(b []byte) []byte { r, err := gzip.NewReader(bytes.NewReader(b)); if err "'!= nil { panic(err) } out, err := io.ReadAll(r); if err != nil { panic(err) } return out } func main() { fdGz := proto.FileDescriptor("giltconsensusv2/stake/tx.proto") if fdGz == nil { panic("nil fd") } fdRaw := &descriptorpb.FileDescriptorProto{} if err := proto2.Unmarshal(unzip(fdGz), fdRaw); err != nil { panic(err) } fd, err := protodesc.FileOptions{AllowUnresolvable:true}.New(fdRaw, nil) if err != nil { panic(err) } sd := fd.Services().ByName(protoreflect.FullName("giltconsensusv2.stake.Msg").Name()) fmt.Printf("service valid=%v full=%s methods=%d'"\\n\", sd.IsValid(), sd.FullName(), sd.Methods().Len()) for i:=0;i<sd.Methods().Len();i++{ md := sd.Methods().Get(i) in := string(md.Input().FullName()) out := string(md.Output().FullName()) inTyp := proto.MessageType(in) outTyp := proto.MessageType(out) fmt.Printf(\"%d %s in=%s inType=%v nil=%v out=%s outType=%v nil=%v\\n\", i, md.Name(), in, inTyp, inTyp==nil, out, outTyp, outTyp==nil) } } EOF cd /srv/repos/gold-chain/bridge/gilt-consensus && go run /tmp/debug_desc.go
